creator: baptiste.daroussin@gmail.com
text:
On Sat, Jul 05, 2008 at 12:00:16AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/ftwin,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/125290 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/125290
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

I approve the patch, this can be commited, thanks.

Bapt
